items.question: How does online palm reading work?
items.answer: You upload or capture a clear palm image. We first extract visible line and shape features, then generate your report from that structured analysis.

items.question: Can I upload a hand image from my phone?
items.answer: Yes. You can upload a hand photo from your gallery or capture one live with your phone camera in a mobile-friendly flow.

items.question: Do I need exact birth time for horoscope readings?
items.answer: Exact birth time improves rising-sign precision. If you don’t have it, you can still receive meaningful horoscope guidance based on available details.

items.question: Can I use both palmistry and horoscope features?
items.answer: Absolutely. Many users combine palmistry and astrology to get a fuller view of personality, patterns, and timing.

items.question: What is Kundali matching and do I need an account?
items.answer: Kundali matching uses the traditional Ashta Koota framework (36 gunas). You need to be signed in so we can run the match securely and keep your session private.

items.question: Are my palm images and birth details private?
items.answer: Yes. Your data is private by default and scoped to your account, so your images, birth details, and reports stay protected.

items.question: Can I receive daily horoscope notifications on WhatsApp?
items.answer: Yes. You can subscribe to WhatsApp updates for daily zodiac guidance, lucky number, lucky color, and short spiritual advice.

items.question: Will my reports be saved to my account?
items.answer: Yes. Your palmistry and astrology reports are saved to your account so you can revisit them anytime.

clientEphemeris.title: Browser birth-chart check (astronomy-engine)
clientEphemeris.subtitle: Tropical Sun, Moon, rising (if we can place your city), and major planets — computed in your browser. Compare with the saved report from our server.
clientEphemeris.geocodeHint: We use your place of birth (Open-Meteo search) only to estimate latitude/longitude for the rising sign.
clientEphemeris.geoLoading: Looking up place on the map…
clientEphemeris.geoMiss: Could not find that place — Sun/Moon still work; rising needs coordinates.
clientEphemeris.needDobTob: Enter date, time, and timezone to see the client-side chart.
clientEphemeris.invalidInstant: Could not parse that birth instant — check date and time.
clientEphemeris.ascNeedsPlace: Add a clearer place name so we can find latitude/longitude for rising.
clientEphemeris.compareNote: ✓ means the saved report sign matches this browser calculation. Small differences are normal if the server uses a different ephemeris, ayanamsa, or house system.

kundaliMatching.title: Kundali matching
kundaliMatching.subtitle: Traditional 36-point Ashta Koota (Guna Milan) from both partners’ birth details. Interpretations are for reflection, not deterministic fate.
kundaliMatching.disclaimer: Guidance only. Not a substitute for counselling or legal advice.
kundaliMatching.featureAshtaBody: Eight parameters—Varna through Nadi—weighted up to 36 gunas, the classical framework for match strength.
kundaliMatching.featureManglikBody: We surface Mars-related tensions where relevant so you can discuss stability and timing openly.
kundaliMatching.featureKarmaBody: Emotional rhythm, communication habits, and long-term pace—beyond the score alone.
kundaliMatching.authRequired: Sign in to run Kundali matching.

kundaliMatching.validation: Please complete all fields for both people.
